tagline: Describe your logo, AI generates it
apiKeyHint: Your key stays in your browser, never stored on our server. Use a full-access key or enable "Model capabilities" scope.
apiKeyHintSettings: Your key is stored locally, never sent to our server. Requires a key with "Model capabilities" scope.
descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. A modern tech startup logo with a blue lightning bolt, the letter M integrated into the design, minimalist style...
editPromptHint: You can edit the prompt before generating.
requiresOpenai: Requires an OpenAI API key to generate logos
errorApiKey: Enter a valid OpenAI API key (starts with sk-)
